creator: brooks@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 197012
Update llvm/clang dependency to 6.0

We'd like to remove llvm40 at some point so update the dependency for clang on 10.x to devel/llvm60.  Port revision is bumped due to RUN_DEPENDS change.  I've verified this this works and is required on 10.4 amd64 in poudriere.
